notes: Case 01-9 (Charles C. Kim vs. Korean Capital Presbytery) appears as item 24 in the docket list of cases before the Standing Judicial Commission reported to GA 29 (2001). The case is listed as an appeal and explicitly stated to be 'in process' at the time of this GA. No decision opinion is present in this volume. The case may have been decided at a later General Assembly. Note: The hunt script flagged this may already be indexed as case_id 1998-6.
